noWallPours: No pours on this pub wall yet.
linkedCompsEmpty: No active competition linked. Organizers can attach this pub when creating or editing a comp.
couldNotLoadSpend: Could not load pour spend stats ({error}). Apply migration
pageDescription: Community pours, ratings, and optional pub notes.
importHoursReview: Review pub name / address below, then Save pub details to update pour records.
importHoursMissing: Google did not return opening-hour lines for this listing (some venues omit them in the API). Name, address, Place ID, and Maps link were filled where available — add hours manually if needed, then save.
toastSignInUpdatePub: Sign in to update pub details.
toastAdminOnlyDirectory: Only the site admin can update pub directory details.
toastPubNameRequired: Pub name on pours is required.
toastPubSaved: Pub details saved. Thanks for helping the community.
toastAdminOnlyMerge: Only the site admin can merge pubs.
toastMergePasteTarget: Paste the target pub’s bar key (from its URL after /pubs/).
toastMergePubNotFound: Could not find that pub — check the URL segment after /pubs/.
toastMergeSamePub: Choose a different pub to merge into.
spendSignedInHint: Your pours with a price, this pub.
spendSignInHint: Sign in to see your total.
canonicalAddressPlaceholder: From Google import or type manually
actionMissingMapsKey: Missing VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY or GOOGLE_MAPS_SERVER_KEY on the server.
wallEmpty: No pours recorded for this pub name yet. Be the first from the home screen.
locationMapBlurb: Location reflects where the community has poured at this pub. Use the map to preview the area, or open Google Maps for directions and the full listing.
noAddressYet: No saved address yet — map search uses the pub name only.
openingHoursBlurb: Hours from the linked Google Business Profile listing.
pourActivityBlurb: Ratings and spend from scores tagged with this pub name.
directoryPublicBlurbEdit: Community notes — visible to everyone. Edit notes below. Listing hours appear in the left column when Google is linked.
directoryPublicBlurbTeam: Community notes — visible to everyone. Updates are managed by the team.
guinnessEmptyHint: Taps, pour quality, nitro — add below.
updatePubDetailsBlurb: Admin only. Import fills Google fields and the pour name/address below — saving updates every score tagged with this pub and moves directory data if the normalized name changes.
hintPubNameOnPours: Must match one another on every pour for this listing. Import sets this from Google; edit if needed before save.
hintAddressOnPours: Shown on the pub card and map search. Leave empty to keep existing addresses on each pour unchanged.
hintOpeningHoursAdmin: Not shown on the public page — visitors only see Google listing hours. Use for internal notes or when Google has no hours.
googleListingBlurb: Link the business profile for hours on the left. Classic Places API + server key required for import. Name and address are applied to pour records when you save.
labelPlaceIdOrUrl: Google Place ID or Maps URL
placeholderPlaceId: ChIJ… or paste a full google.com/maps/place/… link
importInlineBlurb: Uses Place ID field, custom URL, or pub name. Fills pour name/address fields — then
mergeDuplicateSubtitle: Admin only — expand to combine with another listing
mergeExplainer: Use when this page is a manual duplicate of another listing (e.g. “The Old English Pub” vs the full Google name). All pours here are re-tagged to match the target pub; this listing disappears from All pubs.
mergeTargetKeyHint: Open the canonical pub and copy the path after
mergeTargetKeyHintAfter: (hyphen slug or legacy name — both work).
wallIntro: Pours tagged with this pub — same filters as the main Wall. Showing up to {limit} most recent.
hoursEmptyPublic: No linked listing hours yet. Add a Google Place ID or use admin import — visitors see hours from the business listing when available.
